description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular seat and backrest upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and support, and are supported by a sleek, black metal frame. The armrests are straight, tubular, and extend horizontally from the backrest to the front legs, creating a geometric silhouette. The legs are thin, straight, and made of black metal, giving the chaise a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The upholstery has a subtle woven pattern, adding visual interest to the otherwise monochromatic color scheme. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or contemporary waiting areas.
description: A modern chaise with gray textured upholstery, black metal frame, and straight armrests, offering a sleek and comfortable seating option.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat and backrest with both armrests visible and the black metal frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest cushions, as well as the straight, tubular armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the supporting metal frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cushion depth and the clean lines of the armrest and legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is rectangular, moderately tall, and fully upholstered in the same gray textured fabric as the seat. It is thick and straight, with no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, constructed from straight, tubular black metal that extends horizontally from the backrest to the front legs.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal tubing, forming a simple and modern support structure with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a subtle, woven texture in a gray color, giving it a slightly mottled, patterned appearance without any distinct geometric or decorative motifs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: a thick, rectangular seat cushion and a matching backrest cushion, both of which appear to be attached and integrated into the frame, providing a unified and streamlined look.
